title: The Aurora Vista
subtitle: Metropolitan Series // Case Spec 001
description: A masterclass in linear dark framing, custom double-height glazing, and integrated organic structural boundaries.
narrativeP1: Engineered for maximizing dramatic elevation contours, the Aurora Vista centers around an open-axis monolithic layout frame. The perimeter features custom structural steel plates layered with deep charcoal natural slate blocks.
quote: The primary engineering objective was absolute spatial continuity—allowing the external landscape elements to slice seamlessly through the interior.
narrativeP2: The interior layout utilizes advanced hidden support trusses to eliminate internal structural partition column lines, generating completely open zones.

floorplan.title: Level 02 Master Manifest
floorplan.desc: Features a cantilevered sky-bridge connecting the primary residential wing to an isolated creative studio space.

materials.title: Premium Raw Form Elements
materials.desc: Composed of wire-brushed charred timber facades (Shou Sugi Ban) and honed absolute black granite blocks.

elevation.title: Topography Cross-Section
elevation.desc: Engineered with a reinforced deep-pile foundation matrix, compensating perfectly for hillside slopes.

title: The Haven Crest
subtitle: Minimalist Noir Series // Case Spec 002
description: An intricate, multi-level split layout optimized for tight lot boundaries and aggressive hillside elevation angles.
narrativeP1: The Haven Crest balances high-density spatial constraints with a deep visual footprint. Matte charcoal floor-to-ceiling porcelain panels define the exterior grid shell.
quote: We bypassed horizontal restrictions by engineering geometric cantilevers that extend out over the terrain gap.
narrativeP2: By nesting bedrooms within the lower privacy envelope and pushing open-plan entertaining zones upward, this schematic maximizes panoramic window views.

floorplan.title: Lower Split Layout Blueprint
floorplan.desc: Integrates subterranean custom multi-vehicle parking, automated hidden cellars, and lightwells.

materials.title: Monochromatic Finish Spec
materials.desc: Dominated by split-face graphite slate, acid-etched industrial metal beams, and matte carbon interior bathroom veneers.

elevation.title: Hillside Foundation Metrics
elevation.desc: Features segmented retaining walls tied directly into local bedrock structures to arrest shifting earth stress.

title: The Meridian Ridge
subtitle: Metropolitan Series // Case Spec 003
description: An expansive linear plateau design layout emphasizing long horizontal axes and sweeping glass curtains.
narrativeP1: The Meridian Ridge focuses heavily on unbroken Sightline Horizons. The architectural floorplan wraps completely around an interior sunken structural conversation pit matrix.
quote: The structure stretches horizontally to mimic natural ridge line faulting, utilizing structural carbon columns to reduce weight.
narrativeP2: A floating structural roof canopy wraps over the building profile, designed dynamically to manage natural solar tracking heat spikes.

floorplan.title: Main Longitudinal Level Layout
floorplan.desc: Features expansive interconnected entertaining spaces directly mirroring the long outer swimming channel lane.

materials.title: Anodized Dark Metal Elements
materials.desc: Utilizes architectural textured black zinc flashing overlays alongside acid-washed concrete framing panels.

elevation.title: Horizontal Axis Profile
elevation.desc: Maintains a strict flat height limit profile constraint, nesting into the background terrain gracefully.

title: The Obsidian Keep
subtitle: Minimalist Noir Series // Case Spec 004
description: A fortress-like minimalist layout utilizing interlocking monolithic blocks and hidden internal landscape courtyards.
narrativeP1: The Obsidian Keep explores high-privacy luxury. The street-facing facade is completely windowless, utilizing deep geometric architectural slices to catch indirect lighting tracks.
quote: True luxury is absolute control over spatial privacy. We built a stone sanctuary that isolates completely from external elements.
narrativeP2: Once inside, the envelope reveals massive sliding panels that transition into an interior landscape system with reflecting black stone pools.

floorplan.title: Central Courtyard Inversion Scheme
floorplan.desc: All living spaces directly interface with the central layout water feature, avoiding any external property sightlines.

materials.title: Volcanic Finish Selections
materials.desc: Features textured volcanic basalt tiles, dark structural iron framing rails, and structural smoked glazing layers.

elevation.title: Monolithic Mass Diagram
elevation.desc: A rigid cuboid architectural design mass utilizing deep inset voids to establish light entries.

title: The Onyx Monolith
subtitle: Resort Estates // Case Spec 005
description: A luxury multi-level resort-tier compound layout featuring overhanging structural decks and infinite horizon pool tracks.
narrativeP1: The Onyx Monolith redefines elite estate configurations. It features an incredible 25-meter horizontal master wing extending directly over the main valley profile.
quote: The floating structural geometry defies visual gravity, giving the owner an impression of suspension inside ambient cloud space.
narrativeP2: The lower levels feature custom open-air kitchen structures and custom fitness complexes engineered directly within local mountain rock elements.

floorplan.title: Terraced Entertainment Manifest
floorplan.desc: Splits public entertainment lounges from isolated master sectors via custom glass biometric gateway tracks.

materials.title: Polished Stone & Hardwoods
materials.desc: Features vein-matched absolute black onyx slabs, marine-grade black teak decking panels, and brushed gold fixtures.

elevation.title: Cascading Terraced Elevation Matrix
elevation.desc: Four tiers of structural platforms anchored directly down to the cliffside boundary wall profiles.

title: The Shadow Pavilion
subtitle: Resort Estates // Case Spec 006
description: An open-air luxury pavilion architecture concept optimizing internal ventilation tracks and water borders.
narrativeP1: The Shadow Pavilion balances heavy structural protection with deep nature integration. It uses floating multi-layer slatted roof louvers to cast shifting geometric shadows across structural interior surfaces.
quote: Light and shadow are physical building assets. We designed the architecture to morph and alter visually throughout the day.
narrativeP2: Shallow water channels line every walkway corridor, naturally lowering internal ambient microclimate temperatures via breeze vectors.

floorplan.title: Dispersed Pavilion Grid Array
floorplan.desc: Breaks standard residential floorplans apart into isolated spatial modules unified via climate-sheltered outdoor tracks.

materials.title: Carbonized Matte Organic Finishes
materials.desc: Features premium carbon-stained cedar, structured absolute-matte dark slate tiles, and ultra-clear low-iron glass panels.

elevation.title: Low Profile Organic Balance Matrix
elevation.desc: A series of sleek horizontal structural lines that nest safely below the local natural tree-line envelope.
